Rohan Mehrotra

Electrical Engineering @ Georgia Tech

Welcome

Hi, I’m Rohan, an Electrical Engineering student at Georgia Tech interested in the intersection of engineering, business, and complex systems.

I enjoy building efficient hardware-software solutions, from embedded systems to algorithm design, and exploring how technology creates real-world impact.

“Stay hungry. Stay foolish.”

— Steve Jobs
